<!--
Roadmap Template — PER PROJECT
Keep in the repo, e.g. docs/roadmap.md. A living view of where the project is
headed, grouped Now / Next / Later. Deliberately not dated per-item — Now is what
you're building, Next is committed, Later is directional. The project-status
"Next milestone" should point at the top of Now.
Style: no emojis. Monochrome. SF Symbol names noted in comments, not rendered.
-->
